name: Orangehrm
tagline: OrangeHRM open source HR management software.
description:
OrangeHRM open source HR management software.

Docs: https://starterhelp.orangehrm.com/hc/en-us?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  orangehrm:
    image: orangehrm/orangehrm:latest
    platform: linux/amd64
    environment:
      - ORANGEHRM_DATABASE_HOST=mariadb
      - ORANGEHRM_DATABASE_USER=ud3aa30566d
      - ORANGEHRM_DATABASE_PASSWORD=f395a194cfe0ea9f38b8342ed4b10e65
      - ORANGEHRM_DATABASE_NAME=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-orangehrm-db}
    volumes:
      - orangehrm-data:/orangehrm
    depends_on:
      mariadb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42091:80
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - orangehrm_mariadb_data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=d6c4d6e5c02d1ea07171a6fb1bebae15
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-orangehrm-db}
      - MYSQL_USER=ud3aa30566d
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=f395a194cfe0ea9f38b8342ed4b10e65
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  orangehrm-data: null
  orangehrm_mariadb_data: null
